step_by_step_thinking:
I concur with the initial assessment. While none of the listed options can replicate all aspects of the TMJ precisely, it’s important to note that even among these choices, there isn't an ideal match for its complex bony architecture and articular disc configuration. 

Therefore, my final answer remains **D: None of the above**. This reflects the inherent limitations each proposed graft has compared to the intricate design of the TMJ itself. ## End of Response.
